description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a sporty outfit, featuring a short-sleeved shirt with the word 'DRAKES' and a stylized logo on the chest. The shirt is paired with athletic pants that have a side stripe detail, and the figure wears wristbands on both arms. The figure's stance is upright with arms slightly outstretched, and he is wearing sneakers. The facial features are well-defined, with a trimmed beard and short, styled hair. The overall appearance suggests a casual, athletic individual, possibly a team member or sports enthusiast.
description: Athletic adult male in a sporty outfit with a logo shirt, striped pants, wristbands, and sneakers, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view shows the logo shirt, facial features, wristbands, and full outfit details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm, side stripe on pants, and profile of the face and sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, pants, and hairstyle, with arms and legs visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm, side stripe, and profile of the face and sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic short-sleeved shirt with logo, athletic pants with side stripes, wristbands
